topic: How vector databases power retrieval-augmented generation

existing_content.title: RAG from Scratch
existing_content.what_it_covers: Wiring an LLM to a retriever

underserved_gaps: how retrieval quality is actually measured in production

recent_developments.headline: Major vector DB ships hybrid search by default
recent_developments.relevance: Shifts best practice away from pure vector search

key_quotes: We still can't measure retrieval quality reliably

data_points.claim: Hybrid search improves recall by up to 30% over pure vector search on noisy corpora
Most teams ship RAG without any retrieval evaluation harness
Chunk size has a larger effect on answer quality than embedding model choice

common_questions: Do I need a vector database or is a library enough?
How do I measure if retrieval is actually working?
Why does my RAG return irrelevant chunks?

misconceptions.myth: A bigger embedding model always means better retrieval
misconceptions.reality: Chunking and hybrid search often matter more

audience_insights.knowledge_level: Familiar with LLMs, new to retrieval internals
pain_points: No reliable way to evaluate retrieval quality

angles_discovered.name: The retrieval eval gap nobody fixes
angles_discovered.hook: Everyone ships RAG; almost nobody measures retrieval.
angles_discovered.why_now: Survey shows most teams skip evaluation entirely
grounded_in: Most teams ship RAG without any retrieval evaluation harness

angles_discovered.name: Chunking beats your fancy embeddings
angles_discovered.hook: Your chunk size matters more than your model.
grounded_in: Chunk size has a larger effect on answer quality than embedding model choice

angles_discovered.name: Hybrid search is the new default
angles_discovered.hook: Pure vector search is already outdated.
angles_discovered.why_now: Major vendor made hybrid the default this month
grounded_in: Hybrid search improves recall by up to 30% over pure vector search on noisy corpora

sources.title: Major vector DB ships hybrid search by default

research_summary: The biggest untapped angle is the retrieval evaluation gap: teams ship RAG widely but rarely measure retrieval quality, while chunking and hybrid search quietly outweigh embedding-model choice.
